exampleSentences.sentence: An architect designed our new house.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: એક સ્થપતિએ અમારા નવા ઘરની ડિઝાઇન કરી.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: एक वास्तुकार ने हमारे नए घर का डिजाइन तैयार किया।

exampleSentences.sentence: The minister gave a speech to the public.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: मंत्री ने जनता को भाषण दिया।

exampleSentences.sentence: The manager is responsible for the team.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: प्रबंधक टीम के लिए जिम्मेदार है।

exampleSentences.sentence: He is the author of this famous book.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: તે આ પ્રખ્યાત પુસ્તકના લેખક છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: वह इस प्रसिद्ध पुस्तक के लेखक हैं।
